the mpoo sends a tender for the equipment takeover to the mpon

user_text: The process begins with the MPON initiating a request for a device takeover bid from the MPOO. Following this request, the MPOO responds by sending a tender for the equipment takeover back to the MPON. Once the MPON receives the tender, they proceed to place an order with the MPOO. After receiving the order, the MPOO confirms it and sends the necessary master data to the MPON. This confirmation and data transfer mark the end of the process.
output_text: The process begins with a request being reviewed. Following this, the MPON (which stands for a specific party or organization) requests a device takeover bid from the MPOO (another party or organization). Once the request is made, the MPOO responds by sending a tender for the equipment takeover back to the MPON. After receiving the tender, the MPON proceeds to place an order with the MPOO. In response to the order, the MPOO confirms the order placed by the MPON and sends the necessary master data. This marks the end of the process.
